title: Nuggets For All
description: Adds nuggets for every mineral in Minecraft.
body:
Ever feel like it's unfair that only gold and iron have nugget versions?

Me Neither.

But today that all changes!

This mod adds nuggets for:
- Diamond
- Emerald
- Netherite
- Amethyst
- Quartz
- Copper
- Lapis
- Chicken

All recipies are the same style as iron/gold, except for lapis which is 2 lapis makes 18 nuggets, otherwise you will make blue dye.
